description_long: This is a roughly dodecahedral stone with a dark, mottled surface featuring shades of deep purple, black, and white. One face displays a patch of lighter, almost chalky material with a faint marking resembling the number '80', suggesting it may have been labeled or marked for identification. The stone's surface is irregular, with visible angular facets and a generally rough texture, indicating it has not been significantly weathered or smoothed. Subtle marbling and color transitions are present, with some areas showing more concentrated white or pinkish hues. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or openings. Its size and form suggest it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban landscape.
description: A dense, angular stone with a dark mottled surface and a distinct white patch marked '80', featuring rough, irregular facets and subtle marbling.
description_view_0: This view highlights the prominent white patch with the '80' marking on a dark, purplish-black face, showing the stone's angular geometry.
description_view_1: The stone's mottled surface is visible here, with less emphasis on the white patch and more on the purplish and black marbling.
description_view_2: This side reveals a larger area of pinkish-white marbling, with fewer distinct markings and a smoother transition between colors.
description_view_3: A mostly dark, faceted surface with subtle white speckling and less visible marbling, emphasizing the stone's rough, angular shape.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Mottled marbling with irregular patches of white and pink, and a distinct painted marking on one face
attribute_weathering: Slightly rough with minor surface pitting, indicating moderate exposure but not heavily eroded
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved surfaces but may blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements

license_info.creator_display_name: University of Houston - Geoscience Learning Center
